title: Shadow One CRM
description: Full re-architecture of a Salesforce-based recruiting platform into a multi-tenant Laravel CRM — each organisation on its own isolated database. Features AI-powered CV parsing, a fully customisable recruitment kanban, real-time updates, and deep analytics, complemented by a VoIP desktop app and a Chrome extension. Built over one year by two engineers, on strict Clean Architecture and DDD layering with hard dependency boundaries across domain, application, infrastructure, and HTTP.

title: 123 Surveys
description: A full-featured survey platform with AI-powered question suggestions, real-time analytics dashboards, and credit-based monetization—built solo with 60k lines of code over 6 months.

title: La Mobiguette
description: Website for a non-profit French travelling "guinguette" — a retro caravan bringing music, local food, and conviviality to villages. Built around a slug-based inline content edition system: site owners edit text directly on the page, changes are batched in a global store and persisted in a single action — no CMS, no admin panel, zero UI overhead.

title: NAiN
description: A solution to provide enhanced corporate training experience with AI and realtime communication.
